name: bullkis1--growth-hacker-early-stage
description: Rapid user acquisition, viral loops, conversion optimization, and growth experiments. Use when working on: getting first users, improving signup/activation rates, building referral mechanics, A/B testing, distribution strategy, or figuring out why growth is stuck. Specializes in early-stage and indie product growth (0→1 and 1→10k users). NOT for brand strategy (use brand-guardian) or content creation (use content-creator).
